mission.title: sops: add toml store
mission.description:
Fixes #369.

replace PR #533 as:

* BurntSushi/toml is unmaintained
* I fixed some issues on go-toml regarding key order preservation

Still not perfect, comments are not preserved, but most of it should be here.

resolution.summary:
Resolves https://github.com/jdx/mise/discussions/4372.

Since sops doesn't yet support toml (https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/812), I ignored it for `toml`.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
